case_title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSITICE FOUNDATION VS. THE FAUCET-QUEENS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER EXTENDING THE TIME FOR DEFENDANTS U-HAUL AND AMERCO TO RESPOND TO COMPLAINT TO JUNE 2, 2008; STIPULATION
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO U-HAUL CO OF CA. IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2008 TO ADDRESS THE TIME THAT PASSES BEFORE WARNING IS PLACED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSITICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO WINNER INTERNATIONAL, LLC. THE PARTIES DISCUSSED THE QUESTIONS THE COURT POSED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE PARTIES REDUCED THE TIME FOR A WARNING TO BE INCLUDED WITH THE SALE OF THE PRODUCT TO 120 DAYS. THE COURT APPROVED THE SETTLEMENT AND SIGNED AN ORDER IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO WINNER INTERNATIONAL, LLC . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To U-Haul Co Of Ca.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Courtroom Appearance:
David H. Williams, Esq. (510-271-0826), appearing for plaintiff/moving party MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSITICE FOUNDATION

Courtcall Appearances:
Rick R. Rothman, Esq. of BINGHAM McCUTCHEN (213-680-6444), appearing for defendant/ opposing U-Haul Co. of California

Ruling:
PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSITICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To U-Haul Co. Of California.
Hearing held. Plaintiff's counsel informs the Court regarding a stipulation of 120 days before the requirement of a warning goes into effect. The Court grants PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSITICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To U-Haul Co. Of California. An order and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/AH-X)

Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSITICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO WINNER INTERNATIONAL, LLC

Appearances:
David Williams (510.271.0826) for plaintiff and moving party
Patrick Cafferty, Jr. of Munger Tolles & Olson (512-4014) appearing via Court Call for defendant and responding party

The parties discussed the questions the Court posed in the tentative ruling. The parties reduced the time for a warning to be included with the sale of the product to 120 days. The Court approved the settlement and signed an order in open Court. (302/PJM/xAH) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
